title: Capstone 17 — Personal AI Tutor (Adaptive, Multimodal, with Memory)

questions.question: What does a Socratic tutor policy do when a learner asks for the answer outright?
options: Asks a leading question that scaffolds the learner toward the answer
Logs the request and goes silent
Provides the answer immediately and moves on
Switches to a different concept node
questions.question_zh: 当学习者直接索取答案时,Socratic 导师策略会怎么做?
options_zh: 提出一个引导性问题,把学习者一步步引向答案
记录请求并保持沉默
立即给出答案并继续下一个话题
切换到另一个概念节点

questions.question: Which structure does the curriculum graph encode?
options: A directed graph of concepts with prerequisite edges, attached to OER content
A random shuffle of topics
A flat list of unrelated concepts
Only the most recently studied node
questions.question_zh: 课程图编码的是什么结构?
options_zh: 概念的有向图,带有先修边,挂接 OER 内容
话题的随机洗牌
互不相关的概念扁平列表
只保存最近学习过的节点

questions.question: What does the learner model update after each interaction?
options: The base LLM's weights
The COPPA retention policy
The curriculum graph schema
Per-concept mastery probability via Bayesian knowledge tracing or a similar variant
questions.question_zh: 学习者模型在每次交互后更新什么?
options_zh: 底层 LLM 的权重
COPPA 留存策略
课程图的 schema
通过 Bayesian knowledge tracing 或类似变体更新每个概念的掌握概率

questions.question: How is memory split between episodic and semantic stores?
options: Episodic holds every interaction; semantic holds compacted mistakes and preferences promoted from episodic
They are duplicates of the same data
Episodic is for the parent; semantic is for the learner
Episodic holds embeddings; semantic holds raw audio
questions.question_zh: 记忆如何在 episodic 与 semantic 存储之间分配?
options_zh: episodic 保留每次交互; semantic 保存从 episodic 提升上来的、压缩后的错误和偏好
二者是同一份数据的副本
episodic 给家长,semantic 给学生
episodic 存 embedding,semantic 存原始音频

questions.question: Which constraint shapes memory retention for K-12 learners?
options: Retention based on model context length
Permanent retention with no deletion
GDPR only
COPPA-aware retention with auto-deletion after a defined window and parental access
questions.question_zh: K-12 学生的记忆留存受哪种约束影响?
options_zh: 基于模型上下文长度的留存
永久留存,不删除
仅 GDPR
符合 COPPA 的留存: 在规定窗口后自动删除,且家长可访问

questions.question: What is the structure of the efficacy study used to gate the deliverable?
options: Anonymous internet survey
A 30-second AB test
Pre-test and post-test over two weeks with 10 learners, compared against a non-adaptive baseline cohort
A single one-hour session with one learner
questions.question_zh: 用于把关交付物的 efficacy 研究结构是?
options_zh: 匿名互联网调查
30 秒的 A/B 测试
10 名学生持续两周的 pre-test/post-test,与非自适应基线对照组对比
对 1 名学生进行的单次 1 小时会话

questions.question: Which multimodal input paths does the tutor expose to the learner?
options: Text only
Photo only via a custom OCR model
Voice only with no text or photo
Text typed, voice via LiveKit + Whisper, and photo math via dots.ocr or PaliGemma 2
questions.question_zh: 导师向学习者暴露哪些多模态输入路径?
options_zh: 仅文本
仅照片,通过自定义 OCR 模型
仅语音,无文本或照片
文本输入、通过 LiveKit + Whisper 的语音、通过 dots.ocr 或 PaliGemma 2 的拍照数学
